dialog.clues.desc: These clue cards reveal the value of a mushroom color. Memorize the associations - you won’t see them again!
dialog.clues.hint: Remember which value belongs to which mushroom!
dialog.clues.title: Your Initial Clues
dialog.start.desc: Each side gives you initial clue cards for 3 different mushroom colors. These clues will help you deduce which mushrooms are most valuable!
dialog.start.hint: Click on a side to choose it.
dialog.start.title: Choose your Start Card side
header.choose.lot.player: {player} must choose a lot of tokens
header.choose.lot.you: You must choose a lot: <top/> or <bottom/>
header.choose.start.waiting: Waiting for other players to choose their Start card side...
header.choose.start.you: You must choose your Start card side
header.choose.tokens.player: {player} must choose {count, plural, one {# token} other {# tokens}} to keep
header.choose.tokens.you: You must choose {count, plural, one {# token} other {# tokens}} to keep
header.clues: Review your initial clues, then confirm.
header.clues.spectator: Players are reviewing their initial clues.
header.discard.pig.player: {player} must discard a mushroom token for the pig
header.discard.pig.you: You must discard a mushroom token for the pig
header.place.meeple.player: {player} must place a meeple on a Forest tile
header.place.meeple.you: You must place a meeple on a Forest tile
header.place.notebook.player: {player} must place a notebook on a Mushroom card
header.place.notebook.you: You must place a notebook on a Mushroom card
header.split.tokens.player: {player} must split the tokens into 2 lots
header.split.tokens.you: You must split the tokens into 2 lots, then <confirm/>
help.clue.card.desc: A clue card reveals the value assigned to a mushroom color. Only you can see your own clues - use them to deduce which mushrooms to collect!
help.clue.card.secret: Only you can see your clue cards. Each clue reveals the value of one mushroom color. Collect more clues to make better decisions!
help.clue.card.value.desc: This clue reveals which value is assigned to one mushroom color.
help.first.player.desc: The player with this token starts placing meeples and gets priority during the harvest phase.
help.first.player.rotation: The first player token rotates clockwise at the end of each round.
help.forest.tile.desc: Forest tiles hold mushroom tokens drawn from the bag each round. Place your meeples here to collect them.
help.forest.tile.meeple: Each round, you place your 2 meeples one at a time. You cannot place both on the same tile.
help.forest.tile.split: If 2 meeples are on a tile: the 2nd player splits tokens into 2 lots, then the 1st player picks a lot. Each gets their lot.
help.meeple.alone: If your meeple is alone on a tile: you choose 2 tokens to keep, the rest goes back to the bag.
help.meeple.desc: You have 2 meeples. Each round, you place them one at a time on forest tiles to claim mushroom tokens.
help.meeple.split: If 2 meeples are on a tile: the 2nd player splits the tokens into 2 lots, then the 1st player chooses which lot to take.
help.mushroom.card.desc: Each of the 6 mushroom colors is secretly assigned a value card. Collect clue cards to deduce which value goes with which color!
help.mushroom.card.notebook: Place a notebook token here to draw 1 clue card. You’ll learn the exact value assigned to this mushroom color.
help.mushroom.card.scoring: Its secret value determines how tokens of this color score. Some values give points per token, others have special scoring rules.
help.mushroom.token.desc: Collect mushroom tokens to score points. Each color has a secret value that determines how many points these tokens are worth.
help.mushroom.token.scoring: Points depend on the secret value card assigned to this color. Values are revealed at the end of the 3rd round.
help.notebook.token.clue: Drawing a clue card reveals the exact value assigned to this mushroom color. Use this knowledge to make better collecting decisions!
help.notebook.token.desc: Place on a mushroom card to draw a clue card from that color’s deck. This reveals the exact value of that mushroom color to you!
help.pig.token.desc: Pigs are mixed in with mushroom tokens. Worth 3 VP at end of game, but when you collect one you must immediately discard 1 mushroom token from your entire collection.
help.pig.token.discard: When you collect a pig, you must immediately discard 1 mushroom token from your collection (including tokens from previous rounds).
help.pig.token.scoring: Each pig token you keep is worth 3 VP at the end of the game.
help.start.card.desc: At the start of the game, you chose one side of this card. It determined which 3 mushroom colors you received initial clue cards for.
help.value.card.desc: This card is secretly assigned to one mushroom color. It determines how tokens of that color score at the end. Revealed after the last round!
log.discard.for.pig: <0>{player}</0> discards a token for a pig
log.place.meeple: <0>{player}</0> places a meeple on forest tile {tile}
log.place.meeple.first: <0>{player}</0> places a meeple on forest tile {tile}
scoring.antidote.hint: Neutralizes poison tokens to score points
scoring.limit.desc: Score depends on how many tokens of this color you collected:
scoring.majority.desc: The player with the most tokens of this color scores the most points.
scoring.pair.desc: You must collect exactly 2 tokens of this color to score.
scoring.pertoken.desc: Each token of this color is worth points.
scoring.poison.pair: per pair with Antidote or Elixir
tuto.choose.lot: The opponent has split the tokens into 2 lots. As the first player on this tile, you choose which lot to take! So far, you know that yellow, red and blue mushrooms are worth 3, 2 and -1, but you don’t know yet which value matches which color.
tuto.alone.tile: You’re alone on this tile, so you get to pick 2 tokens to keep. The rest go back to the bag.
tuto.discard.pig: You collected a pig! You must now discard one of your mushroom tokens.
tuto.clues: This is how you find out: Clue Cards! You start with 3 clue cards. Each one reveals the secret value of one mushroom color. Only you can see your clues — other players have different information!
tuto.clues.explain: As shown on your Start card, you received clues for Blue, Yellow and Red. Your 3 clues show the values +3, +2 and -1 — but you don’t know which value goes with which color! That’s for you to deduce throughout the game.
tuto.end: Well done! You’ve learned the basics of Amanite. Remember: gather clues, collect the right mushrooms, and avoid the bad ones. Good luck!
tuto.meeples: These are your 2 meeples. Each round, you place them one at a time on Forest tiles. Where you place them determines which tokens you can collect!
tuto.mushroom.cards: Here are the 6 Mushroom cards. Each one represents a color: Blue, Green, Purple, Red, White, and Yellow. You’ll collect tokens of these colors throughout the game.
tuto.notebook: After the harvest, it’s time to investigate! The game lasts 3 rounds, and at the end of rounds 1 and 2, you can use one of your 2 notebook tokens to draw a new Clue Card from any Mushroom card.
tuto.notebook.effect: When you place a notebook on a Mushroom card, you draw 1 clue from its deck. This reveals the secret value of that color — very useful for future rounds!
tuto.pigs: Here is a pig token. When you pick up a pig, you must discard a mushroom token. Each pig is worth 3 points at the end of the game. Pick the pig!
tuto.place.meeple.1: Place your first meeple on the first tile. The mushrooms here match your clues!
tuto.place.meeple.2: Now place your second meeple on another tile to claim more tokens.
tuto.place.notebook: Place your notebook on a Mushroom card to discover its value. For example, you can pick a color you’ve been collecting but don’t know the value of yet!
tuto.scoring: At the end of round 3, all Value cards are revealed and final scoring begins. Each mushroom token you collected scores (or costs!) points based on its secret value. Some values have special effects! Click on the Value cards to see the details of each scoring.
tuto.secret: That’s the core mystery of Amanite! You don’t know which value is paired with which color. Your goal: gather clues to figure out which mushrooms to collect — and which to avoid.
tuto.harvest.start: Once all players have placed their 2 meeples, the harvest begins, starting from the leftmost Forest tile.
tuto.split.explain: When there are 2 meeples in a forest, the second player must split the tokens into two groups. The first player will then choose which group to take!
tuto.tile.zones: Each tile has 2 yellow circles. The left one (with a number) is where the first meeple goes. The right one (with arrows) opens when a second player joins the same tile — this triggers the token split!
tuto.tiles: Now look at the Forest tiles. Mushroom tokens are placed on them at the start of each round. You’ll place your meeples here to claim these tokens.
tuto.value.cards: On the right, 6 Value cards are displayed face down. Each one is secretly paired with a mushroom color. Values range from very good (+3 per token) to dangerous (-1 per token, or Poison!). The link between value and color remains a mystery...
tuto.welcome: Welcome to Amanite! You are a forest animal on a mission: collect the most valuable mushrooms. But which ones are the best? That’s the mystery you’ll have to solve!
